'''kothavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keene|keene]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keene|keene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kothavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothavithi|kothavithi]] || [[word:kothaviji|kothaviji]] || [[word:kothavishi|kothavishi]] || [[word:kothaviki|kothaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothavuthuthu|kothavuthuthu]] || [[word:kothavujuju|kothavujuju]] || [[word:kothavushushu|kothavushushu]] || [[word:kothavukuku|kothavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothavuthu|kothavuthu]] || [[word:kothavuju|kothavuju]] || [[word:kothavushu|kothavushu]] || [[word:kothavuku|kothavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothavufthuf|kothavufthuf]] || [[word:kothavufjuf|kothavufjuf]] || [[word:kothavufshuf|kothavufshuf]] || [[word:kothavufkuf|kothavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothavethe|kothavethe]] || [[word:kothaveje|kothaveje]] || [[word:kothaveshe|kothaveshe]] || [[word:kothaveke|kothaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothavothotho|kothavothotho]] || [[word:kothavojojo|kothavojojo]] || [[word:kothavoshosho|kothavoshosho]] || [[word:kothavokoko|kothavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothavotho|kothavotho]] || [[word:kothavojo|kothavojo]] || [[word:kothavosho|kothavosho]] || [[word:kothavoko|kothavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothavofthof|kothavofthof]] || [[word:kothavofjof|kothavofjof]] || [[word:kothavofshof|kothavofshof]] || [[word:kothavofkof|kothavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothavïfthïf|kothavïfthïf]] || [[word:kothavïfjïf|kothavïfjïf]] || [[word:kothavïfshïf|kothavïfshïf]] || [[word:kothavïfkïf|kothavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothavïfthïfthïf|kothavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kothavïfjïfjïf|kothavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kothavïfshïfshïf|kothavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kothavïfkïfkïf|kothavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothavïfthïf|kothavïfthïf]] || [[word:kothavïfjïf|kothavïfjïf]] || [[word:kothavïfshïf|kothavïfshïf]] || [[word:kothavïfkïf|kothavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothavïfthïf|kothavïfthïf]] || [[word:kothavïfjïf|kothavïfjïf]] || [[word:kothavïfshïf|kothavïfshïf]] || [[word:kothavïfkïf|kothavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothavæthæ|kothavæthæ]] || [[word:kothavæjæ|kothavæjæ]] || [[word:kothavæshæ|kothavæshæ]] || [[word:kothavækæ|kothavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothavathatha|kothavathatha]] || [[word:kothavajaja|kothavajaja]] || [[word:kothavashasha|kothavashasha]] || [[word:kothavakaka|kothavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothavatha|kothavatha]] || [[word:kothavaja|kothavaja]] || [[word:kothavasha|kothavasha]] || [[word:kothavaka|kothavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothavafthaf|kothavafthaf]] || [[word:kothavafjaf|kothavafjaf]] || [[word:kothavafshaf|kothavafshaf]] || [[word:kothavafkaf|kothavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kothavasha|kothavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothavshësha|kothavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothavrosha|kothavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothavmusha|kothavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothavyasha|kothavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothavnkshësha|gokothavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothavnkrosha|gokothavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothavnkmusha|gokothavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothavnkyasha|gokothavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kothathavasha|kothathavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothathavshësha|kothathavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothathavrosha|kothathavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothathavmusha|kothathavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothathavyasha|kothathavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothathavnkshësha|gokothathavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothathavnkrosha|gokothathavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothathavnkmusha|gokothathavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothathavnkyasha|gokothathavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kethævasha|kethævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kethævshësha|kethævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kethævrosha|kethævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kethævmusha|kethævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kethævyasha|kethævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokethævnkshësha|gokethævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokethævnkrosha|gokethævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokethævnkmusha|gokethævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokethævnkyasha|gokethævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kothfavasha|kothfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothfavshësha|kothfavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothfavrosha|kothfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothfavmusha|kothfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothfavyasha|kothfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothfavnkshësha|gokothfavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothfavnkrosha|gokothfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothfavnkmusha|gokothfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothfavnkyasha|gokothfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
